privacy.title: Privacy policy and data protection notice

sections.d: This platform is operated by Oussouri Caviar HUB (oussouri.fr / oussouri.com), established in France, EU. For data protection requests contact contact@oussouri.fr.

Account data (email, display name, company details and contacts stored encrypted), trading data (orders, quotes, document metadata) and technical data (login IP, audit logs). We do not build browsing profiles unrelated to trading.

Contract performance (matchmaking and trade fulfilment), legal obligations (export compliance, CITES, tax and AML records) and legitimate interest (anti-circumvention risk control and security auditing).

Identities and contact details are stored with AES-256 column-level encryption; counterparties only ever see platform codes; staff access to real identities requires a per-case request with a full audit trail copied to the super administrator.

Trade and compliance records are retained as required by EU and export regulations (typically 10 years); data is hosted in the EU (OVH France). We never sell your data; it is shared only with our licensed payment provider (Stripe) and the logistics/customs parties strictly needed for fulfilment.

You may access, rectify and export your data, or request erasure (trade records are anonymized rather than deleted where retention is legally required). Send requests to contact@oussouri.fr; we respond within 30 days.
We only use strictly necessary cookies / local storage (login session, language preference, consent state). No advertising or cross-site tracking cookies.

help.title: How the platform works
help.subtitle: Three minutes to understand how Oussouri Caviar HUB connects Chinese farms with European buyers

buyerSteps.d: Click Register, choose your buyer type (importer, wholesaler, restaurant…). Once the platform approves your account you can trade — your real company details stay with the platform only.
Filter the marketplace by species and grade. Log in to see tiered wholesale prices; every product exposes an anonymized traceability chain (species, fish age, processing steps, yield).
1) Order directly from the cart; 2) Post an RFQ and accept the best quote in one click; 3) Let our broker match you — they will reach out with sourcing proposals.
Your payment goes into the platform escrow account, never straight to the supplier. Track multi-leg cold-chain logistics and customs; you are alerted automatically if the temperature breaches limits.
The supplier is paid only after you confirm delivery. Quality issue? Open a dispute within the dispute window and funds stay frozen until the platform rules.

help.supplierTitle: I am a supplier (Chinese farm / processor)

supplierSteps.d: Register as a supplier and submit your business licence, SC certificate and CITES qualification for review.
In the supplier desk, register farms, source batches and processing batches (with QC). Farm names are stored encrypted and never shown to buyers.
Create products and SKUs (50g/100g tins…), set tiered prices and submit for review. Link inventory to a processing batch to complete the chain.

Confirm paid orders. Before shipping you must register the shipment and complete all 7 export documents (invoice, CITES, origin, packing list, AWB, sanitary, health) — the system blocks shipping otherwise.
After delivery confirmation and the dispute window, escrow funds are settled to you automatically (minus platform commission). You only ever see buyer platform codes.

rules.d: Counterparties only ever see platform codes (SP-000018 / BY-000256). Do not exchange phones, emails or WeChat in chat — messages are blocked automatically and 3 violations freeze the conversation.
Chat via in-platform messaging; documents are forwarded as masked, tracked copies; calls are bridged by the platform (numbers hidden on both sides). Deals made off-platform are not escrow-protected.
All payments are held by a licensed payment provider. Suppliers are not paid before delivery confirmation, and goods cannot ship without complete documents.

faq.a: Usually within 24 hours on business days. Complete credentials speed things up.
Suppliers set tiered wholesale prices (better price at volume); RFQ and brokered deals are negotiable and the final price is frozen in the order snapshot.

faq.q: How do I contact the platform?
faq.a: Open a support conversation via in-platform messaging; a broker will follow up. For urgent matters email contact@oussouri.fr.
Interface in Chinese, English and French; settlement primarily in EUR with the FX rate locked at order time.
